title: document merge semantics in ChatsDelta apply_event handler
description: app.rs lines 58-72: the ChatsDelta match arm implements an upsert-and-prune merge (retain chats whose id is not in destroyed, then replace-or-append each item in created_or_updated), but there is no comment naming this strategy. A contributor adding a new code path that modifies self.chats has to reverse-engineer the merge contract from the loop bodies. The event.rs variant doc says 'incremental delta: chats created/updated and destroyed since last state' which describes the data, not the merge rule. A brief comment in the match arm (e.g. '// Upsert: replace existing entry by id or append if new') would make the intent explicit.
